# Jar Test

**Summary**: A standard laboratory procedure used to evaluate the effectiveness of chemical demulsifiers on oil/water emulsions.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-he|He, 2015]] used jar tests to determine the optimal concentration of polyacrylamide for breaking water-oil emulsions.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The 800 mg/L concentration was identified as the optimum point where volume of separated water peaked and turbidity reached its minimum. ([[2015-he|He, 2015, p. 69]])
